MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. PHILIP C. LAW, TEL. NO. (213)344-8986 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. BRETT KINGSBURY, TEL. NO. 705-1192 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PETITIONERS DC DESIGN & CONSTRUCTION SERVICES and DAVID CHANG's Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus And Writ Of Mandate is taken under submission by Judge Kahn. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976

Notice Of Petition For Writ Of Adminstative Mandamus And Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Continued To Nov-21-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PHILIP C. LAW, TEL. NO. (213) 344-8986 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. BRETT KINGSBURG, TEL. NO. 703-1192 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED REGARDING THE POSITION OF THE PETITIONER TO ENABLE THE COURT TO REVIEW THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD AND EXHIBITS 80-87 WITH GREATER CLARITY. PETITIONERS DC DESIGN & CONSTRUCTION SERVICES AND DAVID CHANG's Petition For Writ Of Adminstative Mandamus And Writ Of Mandate is continued to November 21, 2014 at 3:00 p.m. in Dept. 302 to be heard by Judge Kahn. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/HEK
